data.content: Shipment review approved. All changes on main (merge 9c9340b340d6, impl commits 2d4b8fc379ee, 67259f750b34). CI green — both CI and Coverage Badge passed on head 9c9340b3. All 2237 tests pass. Requirements verified: (1) tally removed, (2) combined all-steps chart present, (3) date selectors show current range + Last 24h preset, (4) per-step leaderboard with margin. Child b2b7 advanced to shipped. No invariants, no regressions.
